name: IpGetAddressAsString
title: IpGetAddressAsString
syntax: long IpGetAddressAsString( dword numericAddress, char address[], dword count); // from 1
long IpGetAddressAsString( byte ipv6Address[], char address[], dword count); // from 2
description: The function converts a numeric address in network-byte order (big endian) to an address string in dot notation as in "192.168.0.10". For IPv6 the address string has to contain a string in colon notation as in "1234:5678:9ABC:DEF1:2345:6789:ABCD:EF12"

parameters.name: numericAddress
parameters.description: The numerical IPv4 address to be converted.

parameters.name: ipv6Address
parameters.description: The local IPv6 address in a 16 byte array.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: The buffer used to store the converted IPv4 address.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The size of the address buffer.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
